creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you, 

(In reply to jo from comment #3)


<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/b39ba076ec01b158a2d99f97e96de8570223bb5e> (2011-10-21): 

> zfs vdev_file_io_start: validate vdev before using vdev_tsd

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/3adfc400f5f6c8b24b825cbe91c14b7d58f3c7fc> (2012-04-11): 

> Illumos #1680: 
> zfs vdev_file_io_start: validate vdev before using vdev_tsd


With a decade passed since then, including the transition to OpenZFS: if not certainly fixed, we might reasonably assume that this bug was overcome by events.
